raw_comment: We say, your sightings depend on the amount of people in an area.  It seems that spring comes earlier in the southern area like January and comes later in the mountainous areas like May. We never know how or when our spring is gonna come because of how many strange conditions we have in April

Spring seems to come later in the mountainous areas.
Spring seems to come in May in the mountainous areas.
We never know how our spring is going to come.
We never know when our spring is going to come.

We never know how our spring is going to come because of many strange conditions in April.
We never know when our spring is going to come because of many strange conditions in April.
